name: overengineering-review
description: Read-only Codex review plugin for spotting over-engineering, unnecessary abstractions, avoidable dependencies, and code that can be simplified.

interface.shortDescription: Review project code for unnecessary complexity.
interface.longDescription: Adds a read-only Codex skill that reviews a project, current diff, or selected files for over-engineering, avoidable abstractions, duplicated wrappers, unnecessary dependencies, and simpler standard-library or native alternatives.
defaultPrompt: Review the current diff for unnecessary complexity.
Find code we can simplify or delete.
